title: The Case Our Department Was Ordered to Forget
description: Staff who research this file report vivid nightmares and paralysis. The absence of documentation itself is classified as dangerous. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 1944: Why This File Was Deleted From Our Database...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Three archivists requested reassignment after viewing the empty folder. Whatever happened in Mattoon was too dangerous for human knowledge. Subscribe for more classified leaks.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption: Staff who research this get nightmares and paralysis. The Department was ordered to delete all records. Even the empty folder is classified dangerous. #horror #mystery #conspiracy #paranormal #creepy

The empty file itself is classified as hazardous. #horror #mystery #paranormal #conspiracy #government #unexplained #creepy
